title: Caesar AI Legal & Governance Case Atlas — Source Registry Entry Schema

id.description: Unique lowercase alphanumeric identifier with hyphens (e.g., ftc-ai-enforcement).

url.description: Root URL or canonical endpoint of the source.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdictional code (e.g., US, UK, EU, FR, Global).

source_tier.description: Source tier determining extraction rules and publishing gates.

allowed_use.description: Strict compliance-controlled scope of data usage.

auto_detect_allowed.description: True if programmatic watchers are allowed to scan this source automatically.

auto_draft_allowed.description: True if programmatic tools are allowed to auto-extract and auto-draft candidate summaries.

auto_publish_allowed.description: True if automatic publication is allowed (strictly false under safety defaults).

license_notes.description: Copyright and data license verification notes.

risk_notes.description: Defamation, reliability, and technical risk commentary.

status.description: Production state of the source (all default to inactive_draft for safety).
